race.description: Schute Bell Badgery Lumby Monaro Wool Mdn Plate
race.comment: WON FOR VICKI (11) finds a very weak Maiden at her third race start and can get off the mark today. Sat just off the speed and was no match for the handy Star Of Lily when second over 920m at Moruya. Only has to hold that form to win this. DIRTBALLER (5) is a three-year-old filly by Graff out of Cersei on debut for the Beer & Carpenter yard. Has shown ability at the trials and expected to go close. PARKER'S PARADISE (9) is a first-starter by Anders out of Parker's Piece on debut for the Neil Osborne stable. Wasn't pushed out when seventh in her recent trial over 900m. Well drawn with the in-form Coriah Keatings aboard. ATHENA ZOSTERIA (2) is a Saxon Warrior filly from Chrysopelia. Keep safe.
